section: UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report
free_text:
**UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES**
**Periodic Transaction Report**

Stamped: HAND DELIVERED. LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER — 18 JUL 11 AM 11:36. (For Official Use Only)

- **NAME:** Rohit Khanna
- **OFFICE TELEPHONE:** (202) 225-2631
- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- [ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: ______ (File an original and 1 copy)
- Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering? [ ] Yes  [X] No
- Report type: [X] Initial Report  [ ] Amendment
- Date of Report Being Amended: (blank)
- *A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late.*

Transaction grid header (columns): FULL ASSET NAME | TYPE OF TRANSACTION (Purchase / Sale / Exchange) | DATE OF TRANSACTION (MM/DD/YY) | DATE NOTIFIED OF TRANSACTION (MM/DD/YY) | AMOUNT OF TRANSACTION (A: $1,001-$15,000; B: $15,001-$50,000; C: $50,001-$100,000; D: $100,001-$250,000; E: $250,001-$500,000; F: $500,001-$1,000,000; G: $1,000,001-$5,000,000; H: $5,000,001-$25,000,000; I: $25,000,001-$50,000,000; J: Over $50,000,000; K: Transaction in a Spouse or Dependent Child Asset over $1,000,000)

Example row (greyed, ignored): JT | Example: Mega Corp. Common Stock | Sale | 02/05/015 | 03/07/15 | B

Data area: "Please see the attached" — no transactions listed on the cover form.
